title: Golden Galore
description: Expands upon golden foods, items, armour and more!
body:
# ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ef42e60a361545d8d16a9c5f6cd5e82d27dc180.png)

Golden Apples and Carrots the only golden food? Why? Lets add 20 more and so much more, ranging from molten gold, decor blocks to fighting Midas and claiming his crown. But be careful, it may have some harmful effects. Other custom helpful and harmful effects from eating golden foods and and many other items, tools, mobs and more.

![footer-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fdc9584b46d835aafb1d329b2f281efad64c46d_0.webp)
